review_reason: Phase 2 blocked: discreteImmediateSuccSeed_consistent proof cannot use forward witness approach. Blocking formula ¬ψ ∨ ¬G(ψ) is NOT necessarily in arbitrary forward witnesses W when ¬G(ψ) ∈ M but G(ψ) might still be in W.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete. Phase 2 blocked on consistency proof for discreteImmediateSuccSeed. The approach of showing seed ⊆ some forward witness MCS fails because blocking formulas are not necessarily in arbitrary forward witnesses.

errors.message: Cannot prove discreteImmediateSuccSeed_consistent using forward witness containment approach
errors.recommendation: Alternative approaches: (1) Direct syntactic proof using blocking formula derivability from M, (2) Semantic proof constructing specific model, (3) Review Verbrugge et al. for exact argument

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented Phase 1 (blocking formula definitions). Phase 2 blocked: consistency proof for discreteImmediateSuccSeed requires different approach than forward witness containment.
